## Summary
**Exit Code: 2** (failure)
The `make fast-ci` command failed due to **Prettier formatting issues** in 2 documentation files:
**Files Needing Formatting:** 1. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Full CI Results:**
- **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1739 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: 2 files have code style issues (warning: requires --write to fix) - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: OK (.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date) - **Type Checking (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5920 passed in 25.35s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 138 passed in 5.46s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 123 passed in 0.86s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 50 passed (output cut off)
The root failure is the Prettier formatting check failing on 2 markdown files. All other checks and tests passed successfully.
